subcodes.first_line: O my God! O my God! Thou hast beheld how my face shone with cheerfulness, my heart was rejoiced and my breast dilated...O ye friends of God! Engage in love as much as you can and be gentle to every outsider; suffer from enemies and behave with patience; see the asleep as the awakened
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ترانی کیف تهلل وجهی و ابتهج قلبی و انشرح صدری لما تلوت اسماء احبائک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @power of prayer, @unity; oneness of humanity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @love and unity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @non-participation in politics, @humility; meekness; lowliness
